kw.name: Set Environment Variable
kw.msg: Environment variable 'PYTHONWARNINGS' set to value 'ignore:Unverified HTTPS request'.
kw.doc: Sets an environment variable to a specified value.

kw.name: Create Ebay Session
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=ebay, url=https://api.sandbox.ebay.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
Crée une session HTTP pour eBay avec le token d'autorisation

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Get Request
kw.msg: Keyword 'RequestsLibrary.Get Request' is deprecated. Please use `GET On Session` instead.

GET Request : url=https://api.sandbox.ebay.com/sell/fulfillment/v1/order/1 path_url=/sell/fulfillment/v1/order/1 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer v^1.1#i^1#r^0#p^3#I^3#f^0#t^', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=None

C:\Users\Pc\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'api.sandbox.ebay.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

errors.msg: Keyword 'RequestsLibrary.Get Request' is deprecated. Please use `GET On Session` instead.
